title: Replace In-Memory State with Persistent Database
problem: contentPipeline, agentComm, campaigns, approvalWorkflow use in-memory Maps/arrays wiped on restart. Draft content, campaign state, approval queues all vanish.
approach: Introduce SQLite or PostgreSQL. Create shared data-access layer with typed repositories for each domain. Migrate all Map-based stores.

title: Add Structured Error Handling and Observability
problem: Routes swallow error context with bare try/catch. No error classification, request tracing, or structured logging. Hard to debug in production.
approach: Create centralized error-handling middleware with classification. Add request ID middleware. Integrate structured logging. Add OpenTelemetry tracing.

title: Implement Authentication & Authorization Beyond API Key
problem: API protected by single static API key. No users, roles, or permissions. Approval workflow can't track WHO approved. No dashboard auth.
approach: Add JWT-based authentication. Implement RBAC (admin/editor/viewer). Add user context to approval workflow. Protect dashboard with session auth.

title: Extract 889-Line Route File into Domain Routers
problem: src/routes/index.ts is 889 lines - massive monolith. Hard to navigate, test, apply different middleware, or have multiple devs work without conflicts.
approach: Split into domain routers: routes/content.ts, routes/social.ts, routes/media.ts, routes/approval.ts. Create routes/index.ts that imports and mounts each.

title: Add Comprehensive Test Coverage
problem: No visible test suite. Critical flows like content generation, social posting, approval workflow have no tests.
approach: Set up Vitest. Write unit tests for services, integration tests for API routes. Add CI pipeline with test coverage requirements.

title: Implement Webhook System for External Integrations
problem: No webhook support. Can't trigger external actions on content approval, campaign completion, or cost thresholds.
approach: Add webhook registration system. Support events: content.approved, content.rejected, campaign.completed, cost.threshold. Add retry logic.

title: Add Cost Controls and Budget Alerts
problem: Cost tracker exists but no spending limits or alerts. No way to cap costs per user or campaign.
approach: Add budget limits per user/campaign. Implement spending alerts at 50%/80%/100%. Add circuit breaker for runaway AI costs.

title: Implement Rate Limiting
problem: No rate limiting on endpoints. AI generation endpoints could be abused for cost escalation.
approach: Add rate limiting middleware. Apply per-user limits on AI generation. Use Redis for distributed rate limiting.

title: Add Dashboard with Analytics
problem: No admin dashboard to view content, campaigns, costs, and performance metrics.
approach: Build admin dashboard. Show content status, campaign performance, cost analytics, user activity. Add filtering and search.

title: Implement Content Versioning and History
problem: No versioning for content. Can't see revision history or rollback to previous versions.
approach: Add content versioning. Store revision history. Implement rollback capability. Add diff view for versions.
